revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''urn:mrn:iala:dic:0901008e

(VTS) Competent authority means the entity made responsible by the Government for vessel traffic services.

Source: 
IMO Resolution A.1158(32)
IALA Guideline G1156 Recruitment, training and assessment of VTS Personnel
